title: Art Generator Project Scope
concept: Defining the task of generating art images from random noise vectors.

exercises.prompt: What do we call random patterns used to generate images in art?
exercises.explain: We call them noise vectors because they are random patterns that help create images.

cards.title: Understanding Art Generation
cards.body: Art generation uses computers to create images. This lesson focuses on how we define the task of generating art from random noise.

cards.title: What is a Noise Vector?
cards.body: A noise vector is a list of random numbers. These numbers act like a starting point for creating new artistic images.

cards.title: Like a Mystery Box
cards.body: Think of a noise vector as a mystery box of colors. Each time you open it, you can create something new and surprising!

cards.title: Creating Images
cards.body: When we plug noise vectors into an art generator, it transforms these random numbers into beautiful images that can surprise us!

cards.title: Myth: It's All Random
cards.body: It's a common myth that the images are just random. Actually, noise vectors are carefully designed to guide the creation process.

exercises.prompt: What is the role of noise vectors in art generation?

options.text: They serve as a starting point for creating images.

exercises.explain: Noise vectors serve as the starting point in the art generation process, helping to create unique images.

exercises.prompt: Noise vectors are only used to create sound, not images.
exercises.explain: This statement is false because noise vectors are specifically used to create images in art generation.

exercises.prompt: The noise vectors start the process of generating _____ images.
exercises.sentence: The noise vectors start the process of generating random images.
exercises.explain: The correct phrase is 'random images' since they reflect the unpredictability of noise vectors.

exercises.prompt: Which of the following best describes the purpose of a noise vector in art generation?

options.text: To create random patterns of sound.
To provide a foundation for generating artistic images.

exercises.explain: A noise vector provides a foundation for generating artistic images by acting as an unpredictable input.

exercises.prompt: What best describes the process of generating art from noise vectors?

options.text: Turning random numbers into structured musical notes.
Using random numbers to create surprising and beautiful images.
Collecting colors to paint a wall.
Setting a random playlist for audio.

exercises.explain: The correct answer explains how random numbers, as noise vectors, are transformed to create unique and beautiful images in art generation.
